title: CollectBidsRequest
description: Request payload used by the Bid Collection Agent to identify suppliers and request offers for one or more procurement parts.

request_id.description: Unique identifier of the procurement request.

currency.description: Expected ISO 4217 currency code for supplier offers.

evaluation_policy_id.description: Evaluation policy identifier to copy into downstream offer evaluation requests.

response_deadline.description: Deadline for supplier bid responses, expressed as an ISO 8601 timestamp.

part_id.description: Unique identifier of the requested part within the procurement request.

plant_code.description: Code of the plant, site, or business unit requesting the part.

material_code.description: Internal code of the requested material or item.

material_description.description: Human-readable description of the requested material.

unit_of_measure.description: Unit of measure for the requested quantity.

required_delivery_date.description: Requested delivery date for the part, expressed as an ISO 8601 date.

max_suppliers_per_part.description: Maximum number of suppliers the agent should identify and contact for each part.

allowed_regions.description: Allowed supplier regions. Use an empty array when no region restriction applies.

preferred_supplier_ids.description: Optional supplier identifiers that should be preferred during supplier identification when eligible.

commodity_category.description: Optional commodity or sourcing category used to identify eligible suppliers.

required_certifications.description: Supplier certifications required for this part. Use an empty array when no certification is required.
